title: PS Sadar Bazar Application Box – Full Feature Build with UP Police Logo

requirements.text: Display the uploaded UP Police logo (logo.png) prominently on the Login page header and in the app navigation bar, alongside the title 'PS Sadar Bazar Application Box - UP Police'.

quotes: ADD NAME -PS SADAR BAZAR APPLICATION BOX AND ADD LOGO UP POLICE

acceptanceCriteria: UP Police logo is visible on the login page above the login form.
UP Police logo is visible in the navigation/app bar on all authenticated pages.
Title 'PS Sadar Bazar Application Box - UP Police' appears alongside the logo.

requirements.text: Implement Admin Login with username/ID and password authentication. Admins must be able to change/update their password. Password update must require verification via the admin's registered mobile number (OTP simulation stored in backend state, since real SMS is not available).

quotes: Admin Login (ID + Password) and also change/update password and verified from mobile number

acceptanceCriteria: Admin can log in with a valid ID and password.
Admin can navigate to a 'Change Password' screen.
Change password flow requires entering the registered mobile number for verification.
Backend stores and validates the mobile OTP (simulated) before allowing password update.
New password is saved and old credentials no longer work after update.

requirements.text: Implement User/Applicant Login with username/ID and password. Regular users are directed to the complaint submission form after login.
acceptanceCriteria: A user/applicant can log in with valid ID and password.
Successful login redirects the user to the complaint submission form.
Invalid credentials show an error message in both Hindi and English.

requirements.text: Build a bilingual (Hindi + English) complaint submission form with the following fields: Name / नाम, Father's Name / पिता का नाम, Address / पता, Mobile Number / मोबाइल नंबर, Complaint Detail / शिकायत विवरण. The form must allow attaching a PDF or JPG file or capturing a photo via the device camera.
acceptanceCriteria: All form fields display labels in both Hindi and English.
File input accepts PDF and JPG file types.
Camera capture option is available for mobile devices (via input[capture=camera]).
Validation errors are shown in both languages.
Form cannot be submitted without required fields filled.

requirements.text: On successful complaint submission, auto-generate a unique complaint number, store it in the backend, and display it to the applicant. Simulate sending an SMS notification to the applicant's mobile number by storing a notification record in the backend (real SMS gateway is not available).
acceptanceCriteria: Each submitted complaint receives a unique, formatted complaint number (e.g., PSSB-2024-0001).
Complaint number is shown on the confirmation screen after submission.
A notification record is created in the backend referencing the applicant's mobile number and complaint number.
The confirmation screen shows a message indicating that an SMS has been sent to the applicant's mobile.

requirements.text: Implement an Officer Management panel for admins to appoint officers by entering their name and mobile number. When an officer is assigned to a complaint, store the assignment in the backend and simulate an SMS notification to the officer's mobile number.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin can add a new officer with name and mobile number.
Admin can assign an officer to a specific complaint from the complaint detail page.
Backend stores the officer assignment against the complaint.
A notification record is created referencing the officer's mobile and the assigned complaint number.

requirements.text: Implement complaint status management with three stages: Pending → In Progress → Resolved. Admins must be able to update the status, enter a resolution detail, and record a hearing date and time for each status transition.

quotes: Status बदलना: Pending → In Progress → Resolved

acceptanceCriteria: Complaint detail page shows current status with a dropdown or button group to change it.
Admin can enter resolution details text when updating status.
Admin can set a hearing date and time when updating status.
All status changes are logged with timestamp in the backend status log.
Status history is displayed on the complaint detail page.

requirements.text: Implement an attendance/hearing record section on the complaint detail page where the assigned officer's attendance details, date, and time of hearing are recorded and stored.

quotes: who attend to applicant fill our detail date and time

acceptanceCriteria: Admin or officer can log attendance details including officer name, date, and time.
Attendance records are stored in the backend linked to the complaint.
All attendance entries are displayed in a list on the complaint detail page.

requirements.text: Generate a printable/downloadable PDF receipt for each complaint containing: complaint number, all applicant details (name, father name, address, mobile), complaint detail, current status, assigned officer details, hearing date/time, and a reference to the attached file. The receipt must be available from the complaint detail page.

quotes: generate recving pdf with attached file with complaint number and details

acceptanceCriteria: A 'Download Receipt / PDF रसीद' button is present on the complaint detail page.
Generated PDF includes complaint number, all applicant fields, complaint detail, status, officer info, and hearing date/time.
PDF includes a note or reference indicating the name of any attached file.
PDF is styled with the UP Police branding (logo and app title).
PDF can be opened or downloaded directly from the browser.

requirements.text: Apply a consistent government/official visual theme across the entire application: deep navy and saffron/gold color scheme inspired by UP Police branding, formal typography, clear bilingual labels, and a clean table-based admin dashboard layout.

quotes: PS सदर बाजार एप्लीकेशन बॉक्स - UP Police

acceptanceCriteria: Color palette uses deep navy, white, and saffron/gold tones throughout.
All pages use consistent font styling appropriate for a government application.
Login page, forms, and admin dashboard all follow the same visual theme.
Bilingual labels are consistently formatted on all user-facing screens.

constraints: Real SMS sending is not available; simulate SMS by storing notification records in the backend.
Real OTP delivery is not available; simulate mobile verification by storing OTP records in the backend state.
The UP Police logo uploaded by the user (logo.png) must be used as the official logo asset — do not substitute or generate a replacement.
All user-facing text must appear in both Hindi and English.
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
nonGoals: Real SMS gateway integration (e.g., Twilio, MSG91).
Real OTP delivery via telecom network.
